scenario: A developer downloads Camunda 8 Run to start local development. They have Java 11 installed on their machine. They wonder if it will work with Camunda 8 Run.
question: What Java version does Camunda 8 Run require?

options.text: 8. Each major Camunda 8 version has raised the minimum Java requirement as Spring Boot's baseline has increased. md:38. Java 11 is no longer supported. 8 requires 21.

Java 8 remains compatible with Camunda 8 Run because Camunda maintains backward compatibility with older JVM versions -- this description does not reflect the actual behaviour. Java 8 support was dropped many releases ago. 8 components, requires a minimum of Java 17 as its baseline. md:38. 8 component on Java 8 produces incompatibility errors before the application can initialise.
8. ); set JAVA_HOME and verify via java -version in a NEW terminal (per :44).

Camunda 8 Run requires no Java installation because it is built entirely with Go and runs as a native binary without JVM dependencies -- this description does not reflect the actual behaviour. exe launcher on Windows is a Go-compiled supervisor process, but the Orchestration Cluster components it manages -- Zeebe, Operate, Tasklist, and the Connector Runtime -- are all JVM-based Spring Boot applications. These components require an appropriate Java runtime. Only the thin launcher wrapper is Go; the substantial workloads run on the JVM.

a.text: Incorrect. Camunda 8.8 components (Zeebe, Operate, Tasklist, Connector Runtime -- Identity split into Management Identity / Orchestration Cluster Admin in 8.8) all run on the JVM under Spring Boot 3.x. Camunda 8.8 Run hard requirement per verbatim c8run.md:38: OpenJDK 21-25. Lower-bound history (for context, not the answer): Camunda 8.5 / 8.6: Java 17 (Spring Boot 3.0) Camunda 8.7: Java 17/21 transition Camunda 8.8: Java 21-25 (current) For Camunda 8.8 Run setup: Install JDK 21-25 (Adoptium / Temurin, OpenJDK, Oracle JDK, Liberica, etc.). Set JAVA_HOME to the install path. Per c8run.md:44: verify with java -version in a new terminal (so updated PATH takes effect). Camunda 8 Run launcher scripts (per c8run.md:65, :80, :590, :597): Linux / macOS start: ./start.sh (or ./c8run start per :71) Windows start: .\c8run.exe start (per :80) -- NOT start.bat (.bat files are a recurring fabrication; the 8.8 distribution ships an .exe launcher, no batch wrappers -- Pattern #9 across the question bank) Linux / macOS stop: ./shutdown.sh (per :590) Windows stop: .\c8run.exe stop (per :597) If only Java 11 is present, Camunda 8.8 Run will fail at startup. Install JDK 21-25 alongside (or replace) Java 11 and update JAVA_HOME.

b.text: Incorrect. Camunda 8.8 Run requires JDK 21-25 per c8run.md:38.

c.text: Correct. Java 8 long deprecated; Spring Boot 3.x floors at 17, 8.8 raises to 21.

d.text: Incorrect. JVM-based. (Only the c8run.exe supervisor is a Go binary; the Orchestration Cluster runs on the JVM.)

explanation: Java 8 long deprecated; Spring Boot 3.x floors at 17, 8.8 raises to 21.
